sizing_rule.note: Single-leg positions use 8 standard deviations for optimal sizing; multiple simultaneous legs require reduction below 8 standard deviations due to exponential time complexity. Exact reduction factor not specified by author. This is a volatility-based adjustment rule (standard deviation) that scales positioning based on position structure complexity.

source_rule_text: For single-leg positions, use 8 standard deviations for optimal mathematical expectation; for multiple simultaneous legs, reduce the number of standard deviations below 8 due to exponentially increased time complexity.
